title: picris strigosa subsp. goniocaula
intro: Picris strigosa subsp. goniocaula, also known as a rare subspecies of Picris strigosa, is a plant species within the sunflower family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Picris strigosa subsp. goniocaula include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant, including infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
